falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,620 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 79% bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that pattern formed after a significant drawdown with lower highs; this would signal the 'HOLD' was actually a distribution phase before breakout, not accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 suggests elevated volatility/uncertainty; sustained sub-12.50 VIX would indicate complacency and risk-on normalization inconsistent with a bottoming market structure, invalidating the pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.85% while SPX simultaneously trades below 5,400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a true flight-to-safety recessionary dynamic rather than a corrective bottom, proving the pattern match failed as the August 2024 bottom occurred without concurrent bond rally/equity crash divergence

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
